title: Business Development Representative - Thailand
description:
About the Team

It's fun to work in a company where people truly believe in what they're doing. At Workday, we're committed to bringing passion and customer focus to the business of enterprise applications. We work hard, and we're serious about what we do. But we like to have a good time, too. In fact, we run our company with that principle in mind every day: One of our core values is fun.

About the Role

At Workday, our Sales Development Representatives (SDRs) are the frontline of our customer engagement, often providing the very first impression of Workday to future customers.

Based in our Singapore Office, you will use your experience and consultative selling skills to initiate long-standing relationships with prospective customers and executive sponsors. You will employ effective selling strategies to successfully position Workday as a viable alternative to legacy ERP solutions. And you will help develop customers into key references for Workday.

As a SDR for Workday you will:

  • Evangelize and educate the market on Workdays technology and applications
  • Generate new business opportunities through strategic outbound calling and prospecting into Thailand Market
  • Establish, build and nurture relationships with senior executives through developing an understanding of their business, the challenges they face, future projects and plans in order to address their needs with Workday
  • Be a trusted member of the regional sales team, collaborate with country managers and work cross-functionally with marketing to define joint strategy for developing the business

About You

We seek individuals who embody the Workday spirit and possess the following qualities / skills:

  • Language Skills: Fluent in English and Thai is essential.
  • Market Knowledge: Proven knowledge & experience selling in the Thailand Market.
  • Natural Leader: You don't wait for permission to act. Whether you've led sports teams, held leadership roles in academia, or initiated movements, we want to hear from those who instinctively lead from the front.
  • Exceptional Work Ethic: You are self-motivated, driven, and hungry for success. Whether it's in sales, sports, or any endeavor, your commitment to learning, growing, and achieving is paramount.
  • Outstanding People Skills: You excel at building relationships quickly and aren't shy about connecting with others.
  • Values Alignment: Our core values are the foundation of our culture, guiding our daily interactions and motivating high performance with mutual respect and unwavering trust. We encourage you to explore our values on our website.

districts.location: D01 Cecil, Marina, People’s Park, Raffles Place
